subject: BoundedIntPower
source_inspiration: Google Guava IntMath.pow(int b, int k)
Apache Commons Numbers ArithmeticUtils.pow(int k, int e)
adaptation_summary: Bounded base to [-5,5] and exponent to [0,8], removed exceptions and overflow helper behavior, preserved scalar repeated multiplication loop, added signedMode branch partition.

subject: SaturatedIntPower
source_inspiration: Google Guava IntMath.saturatedPow(int b, int k)
adaptation_summary: Bounded base to [-5,5] and exponent to [0,7], removed helper calls and bitwise overflow logic, preserved multiplication and final saturation behavior, added highCap branch partition.

subject: BoundedPerfectNumber
adaptation_summary: Converted to bounded scalar input [1,50], preserved divisor-sum loop, removed unsupported helper structure, returned compact semantic class.

subject: BoundedPronicNumber
adaptation_summary: Converted to bounded scalar input [0,50], preserved bounded factor-search loop, removed unsupported library or object structure, returned compact semantic class.

subject: BoundedAbundantNumber
adaptation_summary: Converted to bounded scalar input [1,50], preserved divisor accumulation loop, removed unsupported helper structure, returned compact semantic class.

subject: BoundedPrimeClassifier
adaptation_summary: Converted trial division into bounded divisor-count classification over [2,50], removed exceptions and helper calls, returned prime/composite class.

subject: BoundedEvilNumber
adaptation_summary: Converted bit counting to division/modulo over [0,100], removed exceptions and helper calls, returned evil/odious class.

subject: BoundedKrishnamurthyNumber
adaptation_summary: Replaced precomputed factorial array with small bounded factorial loop per digit over [1,200], returned Krishnamurthy/non-Krishnamurthy class.
